deck: Whirlwind, Inflame+, Bash+, Impervious, Barricade, Shockwave, Rampage, Thunderclap, Shrug It Off x3, Intimidate, Demon Form, Strike+ x2, Defend x2
cause_of_death: Gremlin Leader elite at Floor 23. Entered at 42/80 HP (52%), below 60% threshold. Rally scaled to +12 Str (4 Rallies). By Turn 9, incoming was 68/turn (Leader 18x3 + gremlins 14) vs 10 HP with 13 block.
key_moments: Barricade+Impervious combo dominated Guardian fight -- 30 permanent block wall led to clean boss kill.
Spheric Guardian survived with Barricade+Impervious+Regen Potion but drained 32 HP (80->48).
Impervious wasted on Turn 1 of Gremlin Leader for 30 block against 22 incoming, zero damage dealt.
Systematic Weak multiplier misapplication -- player applied 0.75 to own damage when enemies were Weakened (not player), underestimating own damage output throughout Act 2.
lessons: Impervious Turn 1 against Gremlin Leader is wrong -- use for Turn 4-5 when Rally damage peaks.
Weak direction confusion is a recurring mechanics error that needs correction.
Third consecutive run with no Reaper/Feed offered -- backup healing plan exists but wasn't enough.
Barricade+Impervious is a confirmed strong combo for Guardian.
